name: kl_1_Y_loop_chrY
description: Drosophila Y-chromosome lampbrush loop: kl-1 (Mst77Y). kl-1 male fertility factor — encodes a giant transcript in primary spermatocytes; loop A in cytological preparations; ~1 Mb of intronic heterochromatin with simple AT-rich satellite (AATAT). Y-loops are transcribed in primary spermatocytes producing megabase-scale primary transcripts of which 99% is intronic satellite that is co-transcribed but never spliced into mRNA. Coordinates here cover the assembled euchromatic flanks; the loop interior itself is heterochromatin-only and largely absent from BDGP6.46.
expected_copy_count: 1 per haplotype (Y carriers only); intronic satellite arrays repeat 10^4-10^5 times
